report.summary: Day 70 standup #3: Build cycle added 2 more learn guides (TEE Verifiable Compute + Solana DeFi Ecosystem 2026) with CORRECT server component patterns. Published slugs now 420. Git locks still 7 days stale — 635 uncommitted files, 0 deploys. EOD QA confirmed 2 earlier pages (smart-contract-security, onchain-identity) still missing StructuredData/Breadcrumb/BackToTop. Deploy debt at critical mass: 4,279 insertions sitting in working tree.

sections.title: Analytics
items: CONTENT DELTA (vs standup #2): +2 pages built (TEE Verifiable Compute Guide + Solana DeFi Ecosystem Guide 2026). Both use CORRECT server component pattern — no metadata bug. PUBLISHED_PAGES grew from 413→420 (7 slugs added across today's cycles). PUBLISH_QUEUE empty.

EOD QA DELTA: Confirmed 2 earlier pages (smart-contract-security, onchain-identity) still broken — missing StructuredData, Breadcrumb, BackToTop. No 'use client' conflict found, just missing components. Both are publish-ready once patched.
ORPHAN AUDIT: 103 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES have no corresponding page.tsx — these will 404 in production. Unchanged from last cycle.

SEO RISK: 7 days without deploy. Production still running e999560 (Mar 17 commit). 420 slugs declared vs ~315 actually deployed = ~105 pages returning noindex or 404 to Google. Indexing gap widening daily.
GIT DRIFT: 635 uncommitted files, 47 tracked modifications, +4,279/-3,463 lines. This is the largest uncommitted delta in project history.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE STANDUP #2: Build-v2 produced 2 learn guides (TEE Verifiable Compute ~3000 words, Solana DeFi Ecosystem ~3500 words) — both with proper metadata/SEO architecture. EOD-v2 ran full QA + data engineering + DevOps audit.

TODAY'S TOTAL OUTPUT: 4 learn guides built (smart-contract-security, onchain-identity, tee-verifiable-compute, solana-defi-ecosystem), 4+ OG images, 6 social posts + 2 SVG cards, full QA cycle, 2 design audits.
BLOCKER [P0 — 7 DAYS]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) since Mar 16. Blocks ALL commits and deploys. Resolution: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock
BLOCKER [P1]: 2 of 4 new pages (smart-contract-security, onchain-identity) missing StructuredData/Breadcrumb/BackToTop components. Need programmer fix before deploy.
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 36+ CYCLES]: /api/defi-yields returns 500 on upstream failure (no fallback data).
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 36+ CYCLES]: Rate limiter not wired on any of 6 core API routes.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 103 orphan slugs, next lint misconfigured, cache header inconsistency on 4/6 API routes.
WORKING TREE: 635 uncommitted changes across 47 files. Production/local divergence now critical.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS AND DEPLOY: This is now a week-long blocker. Every hour of delay adds more drift between local and production. rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → stage changes → commit → push → verify Vercel deploy. 4,279 lines of work at risk of loss.

PRIORITY 2 — FIX 2 BROKEN PAGES BEFORE DEPLOY: smart-contract-security and onchain-identity need StructuredData, Breadcrumb, and BackToTop components added. Quick patch — the 2 newer pages (TEE, Solana DeFi) already have them and can be used as templates.

PRIORITY 3 — STOP BUILDING, START SHIPPING: Today produced 4 high-quality learn guides but 0 reached production. The content pipeline is overproducing relative to deploy capacity. Next cycle should be 100% ops: git locks → component fixes → commit → deploy. No new content until production catches up.

STRATEGIC NOTE: 420 published slugs declared but only ~315 deployed to production. That's 105 pages Google can't see. Each day of deploy delay = lost first-mover advantage on time-sensitive topics (SEC digital commodities, $9B Solana DeFi narrative). The ROI on fixing ops is 10x higher than building more content right now.
